brand_building.title: Owned Social — Build, Maintain & Boost
brand_building.what:
Build & maintain CoBa's owned TikTok / Instagram / Pinterest / YouTube, a $500/month agency social boost, and a trial cadence of 20 reels/day to find format-market fit fast.

How: Publish daily against the weekly content pillars; the agency amplifies top organic posts; the 20-reels/day trial stress-tests hooks and angles, and winners graduate into paid + social boost.
brand_building.why: Our owned channels are the brand's home base — where discovery turns into trust and community. A consistent, high-quality owned presence compounds: it lifts every paid and earned effort and is the cheapest long-term CAC lever.

brand_building.title: Creator Community — Endless Summer
brand_building.what:
Two avatars — Equestrian (target 10+ assets/month) and Beauty/Lifestyle (5–10 assets/month). Each cycle we spotlight the creators and assets performing best.

How: Source + brief creators against each avatar; collect aired assets via the trackers; rank by views/engagement; double down on top performers and re-cut their winners for paid.
brand_building.why: Authentic creator voices in our two core avatars build credibility and reach the brand can't manufacture alone — and seed the Endless Summer launch with real social proof.

brand_building.title: Mass Seeding — #cobasdaughter
brand_building.what:
Re-edit hundreds of content pieces and mass-seed across TikTok, Instagram, Threads and Reddit. Every seeding post carries #cobasdaughter and tags the brand.

How: A VA + seeding-account network posts daily from the re-edit backlog; everything is logged in the seeding sheets with aired links + metrics, and #cobasdaughter ties it back to one measurable footprint.
brand_building.why: High-volume, native-feeling seeding manufactures ambient demand at low cost — turning a backlog of content into hundreds of touchpoints that make the brand feel like it's everywhere.

coverage.how: Google Sheet · aired links (no view metrics)

buzz.explainer: Brand Buzz blends volume (posts), depth (engagement) and reach (views) into one number per channel. Now live from the trackers' logged metrics. Score = posts×1.0 + (engagement/100)×0.5 + (views/1000)×0.3.

exec_summary:
• Amazon is driving 80% of revenue at $8,088 NMV but ad ROAS of 0.85 signals paid spend is underperforming—immediate audit of creative and bidding strategy required.

• Valiset accounts for 50% of total NMV ($5,104), creating dangerous concentration risk that demands urgent diversification of product-level marketing investment.

• Amazon awareness exploded 5,805% MoM to 277K impressions, yet conversion efficiency suggests the traffic surge isn't translating to proportional sales lift.

• Instagram audience growth of 201 followers MTD is flat relative to 333K brand impressions—engagement rate of 4.8% indicates content resonance gap between awareness campaigns and community building.
